body_preview: - Assessment line 55: `state why last-failure` returns "no failures recorded, notes 1 incomplete run (current session), suggests state trace / state crashes" — basic cold-start behavior already works - The seed task's premise (returning only "no state event found") is stale; the assessment proves cold-start already distinguishes incomplete runs - BUT the out

title: Add run-ID and timestamp detail to cold-start state diagnostics
